note: The public 2025-2026 official Handbook publishes 4 units of Social Sciences Common Core, 45 units of Major Required Courses, an explicit 14-course Major Elective pool, and two required Honours Project courses for 3 units. The Common Core requires SOSC1006 plus one of SOSC3005 and SOSC3006. However, the official footnote says SOWK3005 Field Practice I fulfils the 3-unit Experiential Learning in Action requirement, and students must replace those 3 units with additional SOWK Major Elective units; therefore the displayed 18-unit Major Elective requirement becomes a total of 21 SOWK Major Elective units. SOWK3005, SOWK4008 and SOWK4009 are retained as required field-practice courses. The individual 2025-2026 course-directory page for SOWK1027 returns 'No result found'; its code, title and 0.5-unit value are retained from the explicit official Programme requirement table and flagged accordingly. Individual course pages supply their current canonical titles where punctuation, capitalization or wording differs from the Programme table. The 2026-2027 Handbook route currently returns HTTP 401, so no 2026-2027 course or rule is inferred. University Language, General Education and Free Electives are excluded. No Year or Term is assigned because the public requirement table does not publish course timing.
